testcase.classname: SnackyNerds API GET /api/health should return 200 and status ok
testcase.name: SnackyNerds API GET /api/health should return 200 and status ok

testcase.classname: SnackyNerds API GET /api/snacks should return all snacks
testcase.name: SnackyNerds API GET /api/snacks should return all snacks

testcase.classname: SnackyNerds API GET /api/snacks/:id should return a snack if found
testcase.name: SnackyNerds API GET /api/snacks/:id should return a snack if found

testcase.classname: SnackyNerds API GET /api/snacks/:id should return 404 if snack not found
testcase.name: SnackyNerds API GET /api/snacks/:id should return 404 if snack not found

testcase.classname: SnackyNerds API POST /api/snacks should create a new snack
testcase.name: SnackyNerds API POST /api/snacks should create a new snack

testcase.classname: SnackyNerds API PUT /api/snacks/:id should update a snack
testcase.name: SnackyNerds API PUT /api/snacks/:id should update a snack

testcase.classname: SnackyNerds API PUT /api/snacks/:id should return 404 if updating non-existent snack
testcase.name: SnackyNerds API PUT /api/snacks/:id should return 404 if updating non-existent snack

testcase.classname: SnackyNerds API DELETE /api/snacks/:id should delete a snack
testcase.name: SnackyNerds API DELETE /api/snacks/:id should delete a snack

testcase.classname: SnackyNerds API DELETE /api/snacks/:id should return 404 if deleting non-existent snack
testcase.name: SnackyNerds API DELETE /api/snacks/:id should return 404 if deleting non-existent snack
